title: Simple Chunkloader [FABRIC]
description: This mod adds a simple chunkloader for fabric.
body:
This chunk loader enables in the loaded chunks:

   - Random Ticking (Grow Seeds/Saplings)

   - Mobspawning

   - Block Ticking

   - Entity Ticking





Select a range between 1x1, 3x3 and 5x5 chunks:

![](https://i.imgur.com/G2Eby2L.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/uCSev5b.png)
